reviews.review_msg: Sincerely nice guy and hard working prof.

He is The Best Teacher I have ever had in University. I was really lucky to have taken a class with him. Besides his personal achievements and knowledge about what he is teaching, he is the friendliest prof you will have. He is amazing

Best class i've ever had with a teacher who is too good for the institution if I could be honest, this guy belongs to a top Ivy leauge school. I feel lucky that I got to have a class with this professor!
